name: QA 854
description:
PCP QA Test No. 854

Check PMCD state change notification, aka PMCD_ADD_AGENT



This one checks sample.dynamic.meta.pmdesc.sem ... see also qa/1055



Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat, Inc.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 854

Check PMCD state change notification, aka PMCD_ADD_AGENT

This one checks sample.dynamic.meta.pmdesc.sem ... see also qa/1055

Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat, Inc.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce

< log sample.dynamic.meta.metric
< archive contents before pmda simple restart...
< expect no <mark> record

< pminfo -f sample.dynamic.meta.pmdesc.sem
< changing semantics from 4 to 3
< sample.dynamic.meta.pmdesc.sem old value=4 new value=3
< restart the simple pmda
< archive contents after pmda simple restart...
< expect no <mark> record
< ---------------------------------------------------------------
<     29.0.86 (sample.dynamic.meta.metric): value 42
< ---------------------------------------------------------------
< Semantics of metric "sample.dynamic.meta.metric" have changed from discrete to instant

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 854

Check PMCD state change notification, aka PMCD_ADD_AGENT



This one checks sample.dynamic.meta.pmdesc.sem ... see also qa/1055



Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat, Inc.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce
